url.description: Pre-signed URL to download the requested file.

resolvedMimeType.description: MIME type of the resolved symlink target file. Can be `null` for normal downloads or when symlink resolution fails.

resolvedPath.description: Cloud storage path of the resolved symlink target. Can be `null` for normal downloads or when symlink resolution fails.

warning.description: Warning message returned when symlink resolution falls back to the symlink file itself. Can be `null`.

404.description: NotFound — workspace or credentials not found, API disabled for the workspace, or data-link or path not found
